game_name: Super Fire Pro Wrestling X Premium

design_philosophy.core_loop: Timing-based grappling exchanges with strategic move sequencing—players build momentum through weaker moves to enable increasingly powerful techniques against opponents
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Read and counter opponent's move selection while managing positioning and stamina to execute devastating combination sequences
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Master the technical execution and strategic depth of professional wrestling by controlling wrestlers through complex grappling systems and creating dream matchups across wrestling styles
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately eschews button-mashing wrestling game conventions in favor of a timing and strategy-based grappling system; refuses licensing in favor of creating unlicensed wrestler likenesses, allowing creative freedom in roster design and customization; emphasizes deep CPU behavior editing and character creation over licensed authenticity

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can customize CPU wrestler behavior and logic through detailed edit mode, allowing creation of opponents scaled to their skill level; match type and rule variations provide difficulty modulation

progression.unlock_mechanism: Character roster unlocked through play; match victories unlock additional wrestlers and customization options
replayability_hooks: Extensive edit mode allowing creation of custom wrestlers with personalized movesets and AI behavior
Large roster of international wrestling styles (lucha-libre, puroresu, strong-style, joshi wrestling, hardcore)
Multiple match types including extreme variants (Landmine Death Match, Electric Barbed Wire Cage Match)
Dream matchup creation across wrestling promotions and eras
CPU logic customization enables recreation of real-life wrestler behavior patterns

world_building_techniques: Wrestler roster drawn from international professional wrestling styles and promotions
Match type variety reflects different wrestling promotion philosophies (WWE entertainment vs. Japanese strong-style authenticity)
Renamed real-life wrestlers create implicit knowledge base for wrestling fans

faction_indicators: Japanese puroresu wrestlers (junior-heavyweight, strong-style, joshi, hardcore variants)
danger_signals: Extreme match types (hardcore, death matches, cage matches)
CPU behavior editing enabling creation of overpowered or rule-breaking opponents
environmental_storytelling: Ring design customization reflects wrestling promotion identity
Championship belt aesthetics signal promotion prestige and style
Wrestler appearance and moveset combinations tell implicit narrative of their training origin

sources_used: wikipedia: Fire Pro Wrestling series overview
